message:
fix: record events in addWispLabel/removeWispLabel (bd-0jph)

addWispLabel and removeWispLabel were performing INSERT/DELETE on
wisp_labels without recording events in wisp_events. This meant wisp
label changes had no audit trail visible via 'bd log'. Now both
functions use transactions and call recordEventInTable with the
appropriate EventLabelAdded/EventLabelRemoved event types, matching
the behavior of the permanent AddLabel/RemoveLabel in labels.go.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/basalt
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
